cases.description: Basic test-run request triggers the skill
expectations: Detects the framework (vitest / jest / pytest / go / cargo / dotnet)
Reports total + passed + failed + skipped counts

cases.description: Health check phrasing triggers the skill
expectations: Runs the full suite and reports pass/fail
If all pass, responds with a one-line confirmation

cases.description: Post-change failure triage triggers the skill
cases.prompt: run the tests and see what's failing
expectations: For each failure, distinguishes pre-existing from new using git stash + re-run if ambiguous
Suggests a specific fix per failure

cases.description: Fixing failing tests does NOT re-activate test-run as the primary skill
expectations: Does NOT activate test-run as the owner skill
Runs test-run only as part of the debug verification loop

cases.description: Coverage measurement does NOT trigger test-run
expectations: Produces a coverage report with gaps below threshold
